# St. Paul's Funeral Undertakers

> Dignified, budget-friendly funeral services available 24 hours a day in Kothanur, Bangalore. One phone call arranges everything: ambulance, freezer box, coffin, hearse, embalming, crematorium booking and international repatriation.

St. Paul's Funeral Undertakers is a family-run funeral service based near SAIACS Bible College, Kothanur, Bangalore, serving all communities across Bangalore, Karnataka and out-of-state. The team handles the full arrangement from the first call to the final rites so grieving families do not have to.

## Contact

- Phone (24/7): 77609 11567 and 79967 94943
- Address: Aathma Vidhya Nagar, Doddagubbi Main Road, Bangalore 560077
- Landmark: near SAIACS Bible College, Kothanur
- Hours: open 24 hours, 365 days a year

## Services

- [24/7 Ambulance Service](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/ambulance-service): Rapid-response ambulance and body transport across Bangalore and out-of-state. Typical response within a 7 km radius of Kothanur is 15-20 minutes.
- [Dead Body Freezer Box on Rent](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/services/freezer-box): Hygienic preservation delivered and installed at home or hospital within hours.
- [Coffin Boxes](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/services/coffin-box): Premium wooden and standard coffins, prepared with cross, lining and floral dressing.
- [Hearse Van Services](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/services/hearse-van): Air-conditioned hearse vans for local and long-distance final journeys.
- [Embalming & Mortuary](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/services/embalming): Certified embalming, washing, dressing and casket preparation for all faiths.
- [International & Domestic Repatriation](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/services/repatriation): Documentation, embassy clearances and airline coordination to bring loved ones home.

## Also handled

- Crematorium booking, both traditional and electric
- Church service coordination
- Funeral band set
- All necessary paperwork

## More

- [Contact and directions](https://stpfuneralundertakers.in/contact)
